allow: Bash(python -c 'from app.services.scoring_service import compute_top_scorers, calculate_points, _normalize_name; ts = compute_top_scorers\('\\''Mbappé, Griezmann'\\'', '\\''Neymar, Neymar, Vinícius'\\''\); print\('\\''top_scorers:'\\'', sorted\(ts\)\); print\('\\''1\)'\\'', calculate_points\(2,3,2,3,'\\''neymar'\\'', ts\), '\\''\(esp 6, placar exato + artilheiro\)'\\''\); print\('\\''2\)'\\'', calculate_points\(1,2,2,3,'\\''Neymar'\\'', ts\), '\\''\(esp 3, resultado + artilheiro\)'\\''\); print\('\\''3\)'\\'', calculate_points\(2,3,2,3,'\\''Mbappe'\\'', ts\), '\\''\(esp 5, placar exato, mbappe nao eh artilheiro\)'\\''\); print\('\\''4\)'\\'', calculate_points\(3,2,2,3,'\\''Neymar'\\'', ts\), '\\''\(esp 0, errou tudo\)'\\''\); ts0 = compute_top_scorers\('\\''null'\\'', '\\''null'\\''\); print\('\\''empty:'\\'', ts0\); print\('\\''5\)'\\'', calculate_points\(0,0,0,0,'\\''Qualquer'\\'', ts0\), '\\''\(esp 5, 0x0 sem artilheiro\)'\\''\);')
